title: Study Planner Template
summary: Generator and workbook template for people searching for a study planner template, with copy/export intent and paid-path handoff.
selection_rule: Choose this module for the exact no-login study planning workflow, then show plan build, export, and save intent immediately.

entries.title: Study Planner Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, set goal/target date, and click Build study plan.
entries.smoke_test: Open the same page and confirm totals, plan text, and workbook CSV export appear after click.
entries.proof_signal: Formula-based local calculations, explicit assumptions, visible save/export intent, and event hooks.
entries.fallback: Check external references: Etsy templates, Reddit study tips, and GoodNotes organization threads.
entries.adoption_metric: organic clicks, qualified tool completions, exports/copies/saves, paid CTA clicks, checkout starts, purchases, and repeat use
entries.task_phrase: A person searching study planner template needs a working plan with zero signup friction.
entries.install_or_save_intent: download workbook CSV or copy generated plan text

examples: Build a 14-day plan for a 56-hour monthly goal
Export one CSV to Notion, OneNote, or Apple Notes
Copy plan text directly into a student message
resolver_registry_entry.fallback: Use external templates and community references if a strict syllabus-specific planner is required.

install_or_save_intent: download workbook CSV or copy generated plan text
fallback: If the core schedule formula is not enough, use official course syllabi and one of the linked references first.
